master_row.title: SEMIDIURNAL BEAT FREQUENCY Canonical Statutory Formula: ω_beat
master_row.canonical_statement: [ID 1148] SEMIDIURNAL BEAT FREQUENCY Canonical Statutory Formula: $\omega_{beat} = |\omega_{solar} - \omega_{lunar}| \implies T_{semi} \approx 12.42$ hr Formal Technical Dissertation: Theorem 3. Resolves the tidal period paradox. It identifies the 12.42-hour semidiurnal cycle not as a direct force effect, but as a beat frequency emerging from the interference between solar and lunar spacetime oscillation modes. Source:
